title: Lifted

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: From the depths You lifted me
When my enemies were closing in
You heard my desperate melody
And pulled me from the edge again

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You turned my mourning into dancing
Stripped away these chains of grief
Now my heart can't help but singing
Your mercy brought me sweet relief

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: In my pride I thought I stood
Like a mountain, firm and strong
But when You hid Your face I understood
That all my strength belonged to You all along

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You turned my mourning into dancing
Stripped away these chains of grief
Now my heart can't help but singing
Your mercy brought me sweet relief

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Weeping may last through the darkest night
But joy comes with the morning light
Your favor lasts a lifetime, Lord
Your favor lasts a lifetime more

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: You turned my mourning into dancing
Stripped away these chains of grief
Now my heart can't help but singing
Your mercy brought me sweet relief
(I'll praise You endlessly)

epigraph: for thou hast lifted me up
